verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Oh Lord You've searched me You know my ways Even when I fail You I know You love me

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Your holy presence Surrounding me In every season I know You love me I know You love me

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: At the cross I bow my knee Where Your Blood was shed for me There's no greater Love than this You have overcome the grave Glory fills the highest place What can separate me now?

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: You go before me You shield my way Your hand upholds me I know You love me

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: You tore the veil You made a way When You said that it is done You tore the veil You made a way When You said that it is done

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: And when the earth fades falls from my eyes You stand before me I know You love me I know You love me
